record.text:
Running a live Graph RAG workshop on July 11.

You'll go from raw text → entity extraction → knowledge graph → grounded chatbot in one afternoon. Using spaCy, REBEL, NetworkX, and an LLM.

This is the pipeline that makes LLM apps actually trustworthy — no hallucination, traceable answers.

record.text: Maschinelles Lernen ist ein Teilgebiet der KI. Statt jede Regel zu programmieren, lernt das System aus Beispielen und erkennt selbstständig Muster in den Daten. #KI #MachineLearning #Allgemeinwissen

KI hat kein Bewusstsein, keine Gefühle und keine eigenen Absichten. Sie verarbeitet Informationen anhand mathematischer Modelle und Wahrscheinlichkeiten – auch wenn ihre Antworten manchmal sehr menschlich wirken. #KI #ArtificialIntelligence #Allgemeinwissen

Nicht jede KI ist generativ. Viele KI-Systeme erkennen Muster, sortieren Daten oder treffen Vorhersagen. Generative KI erstellt dagegen neue Inhalte wie Texte, Bilder, Musik oder Code. #KI #GenerativeAI #Allgemeinwissen

record.text: Your 5-Minute Win: Next time you prompt the AI during your morning scroll, add this structure. Start with Act as a [specific role]. Then add For every claim you make, include a confidence level and note if the information could be outdated or disputed. Try it right now with any topic you're […]

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.bridgyOriginalText: Your 5-Minute Win: Next time you prompt the AI during your morning scroll, add this structure. Start with Act as a [specific role]. Then add For every claim you make, include a confidence level and note if the information could be outdated or disputed. Try it right now with any topic you're curious about. Compare the result to what you'd get without those instructions. The difference in reliability is immediate. (4/5)

external.title: Original post on streetwi.se

record.text: . Instead of just saying act as a historian, you say act as a historian who only states facts they can back with primary sources, and flag anything uncertain. That one addition changes the entire output. The AI stops guessing and starts qualifying. (3/5)

Seriously considering cancelling my place, the world has changed, it's made me question all my reasons for my participation and what it means to me. Not interested in 'keeping up' with tech any more, I have more knowledge than I need as it is. I have #AuDHD #BPD and #cPTSD way too much stress (3/3)

I'm sure someone has suggested somewhere that all degrees develop a compulsory module, or topic, that covers the use/misuse of #GenerativeAI and how to get the most out of it within ethical parameters, but that's not what most people sign up to learn, not their subject, but it is their time (2/3)

Generative AI Guidance For Students
The Open University @openuniversity.bsky.social 

I'm not convinced. I strongly agree with views regarding potential decline in terms of cognition. True, some mainly younger, career focused students just want the certificate. But some of us want to learn #AI (1/3)

value.text:
Dragon and the Old Bridge
#DragonTuesday
#AIart #AIArtCommunity #AIイラスト

images.alt:
この絵画は、深い森の奥深く、雨が降りしきる湖のほとりを描いた幻想的で静かな作品です。キャンバス全体に油絵特有の重厚な質感が漂っています。

中央の構造物: 画面中央には、古びて苔むした、あるいは風化した大きな石造りのアーチ橋がそびえ立っています。

ドラゴン: その橋の頂上には、黒く長い東洋風のドラゴン（竜）のシルエットが横たわっています。尾はアーチの下へとしなやかに垂れ下がり、頭部は右側を向き、静かに下を見下ろしています。

人物の佇まい: 右下の湖畔には、マントを羽織った一人の人物の黒いシルエットが佇んでおり、橋の上のドラゴンを見上げているかのように見えます。

背景と色彩: 周囲はオレンジや茶色に色づいた木々に囲まれ、背景や湖面は深い青緑色（ターコイズブルー）と黒で満たされています。全体にうっすらと縦の直線が描かれ、激しい雨が降り注いでいる様子と、それが湖面に反射する美しい情景が表現されています。

この絵画は、深い森の奥深く、雨が降りしきる湖のほとりを描いた幻想的で静かな作品です。キャンバス全体に油絵特有の重厚な質感が漂っています。

ドラゴン: その橋の頂上には、黒く長い東洋風のドラゴン（竜）のシルエットが横たわっています。尾はアーチの下へとしなやかに垂れ下がり、頭部は右側を向き、静かに下を見下ろしています。

人物の佇まい: 右下の湖畔には、マントを羽織った一人の人物の黒いシルエットが佇んでおり、橋の上のドラゴンを見上げているかのように見えます。

背景と色彩: 周囲はオレンジや茶色に色づいた木々に囲まれ、背景や湖面は深い青緑色（ターコイズブルー）と黒で満たされています。全体にうっすらと縦の直線が描かれ、激しい雨が降り注いでいる様子と、それが湖面に反射する美しい情景が表現されています。

images.alt: [a celestial traveler angel resting on a carved marble ledge inside a sunlit temple of pale stone columns and glowing architecture. Warm golden light fills the scene, illuminating large white feathered wings with subtle texture, natural variation, and gently weathered edges that suggest long journeys. Delicate arcs of starlight, faint constellations, and tiny luminous particles drift around the figure’s head and shoulders, forming a soft celestial halo. flowing sheer fabrics, detailed bracers, blending practicality with adventure. The pose is calm and reflective, with an approachable expression and quiet confidence. The marble setting, radiant sky, and soft celestial effects create a mood of serenity and wonder. Balance grounded realism with divine presence: majestic, gentle, and briefly resting beneath the stars.]

images.alt: [Full-body editorial anime-inspired fashion portrait of an adult cybernetic catgirl standing in a sunlit doorway, leaning forward toward the viewer with one arm extended as if taking a playful selfie or greeting someone entering the room. Close vertical composition with dynamic foreground perspective, raised arm creating depth, confident relaxed posture, slight torso angle, one hand lifted in a cheerful gesture, small mischievous smile, direct eye contact, glossy stylized lashes, delicate facial markings, soft expressive features. Voluminous twin-bun hairstyle with loose wispy strands and layered bangs, large cat-like ears integrated into the silhouette, sleek futuristic styling with subtle mechanical details. Fitted glossy one-piece bodysuit with thin straps, deep neckline, ruffled hip trim, high-shine synthetic textile, subtle seam lines and panel detailing, matching long gloves, sci-fi couture influence, polished fashion editorial finish. Bright modern apartment or hotel doorway setting, tall window behind the subject, clean tiled floor, soft daylight flooding the room, suitcase placed near the wall suggesting arrival or travel, one calm cat in the foreground, one small robotic cat companion in the background waving excitedly. Warm backlighting, soft bloom, gentle rim highlights, cinematic sun haze, clean shadows, vibrant contrast, depth of field, crisp anime linework, painterly highlights, futuristic cozy atmosphere, playful slice-of-life sci-fi mood, high-detail rendering, polished composition.]
